description:
An intuitive diagram software with templates for any scenario.

EdrawMax is a powerful, all-in-one, and yet easy-to-use diagramming tool that enables users to visualize the ideas effortlessly. With EdrawMax, you can create and customize flowcharts, Venn diagrams, mind maps, organizational charts, Gantt charts, UML diagrams, electrical drawings, genograms, building plans, etc.
1. Edraw AI Updates:
a. Support generating over 10 types of diagrams with a single sentence, including flowcharts, timelines, infographics, social media graphics, PPT slides, framework diagrams, lean canvas, user profile, etc.
b. Support pre-selecting templates and using AI to generate similar diagrams; offer multiple high-quality and visually appealing templates.

2. Mind Map Function Optimizations:
a. Support inserting multiple topics;
b. Support importing TXT files and exporting to Excel files.

3. Default Settings Optimizations:
a. New default settings for graphic border thickness and default background color.

4. Table Function Optimization:
a. Support setting row height values in tables.
